---
name: Friction report
about: Something in the framework didn't work well in practice
labels: friction
---

## What you were trying to do

<!-- Describe the task or workflow you were following -->

## What the framework didn't help with

<!-- Which artifact, template, rule, or pipeline step failed you?
     Specific is better than vague — "the REQ template was unclear about X"
     is more useful than "the docs were confusing" -->

## What you did instead

<!-- How did you work around it? What did you invent on the fly? -->

## Suggested improvement

<!-- Optional — you don't need a solution to file a friction report.
     But if you have one, share it. -->

## Project context

<!-- Optional — was this a solo project, a team, an AI-heavy workflow?
     Context helps us understand whether the issue is universal. -->
